name: Venison Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and slice the venison meat.
2. Place the sliced meat in a dish.
3. Mix the dry ingredients (salt, sugar, black pepper, garlic powder, monosodium glutamate) in a separate bowl.
4. Sprinkle the mixed dry ingredients on top of the sliced venison.
5. Add liquid smoke to the mixture and cover the dish with plastic wrap or foil.
6. Refrigerate for 24 hours.
7. Preheat the oven to low temperature (200 degrees).
8. Place foil on the bottom of the oven rack.
9. Put the marinated meat directly on the oven racks.
10. Cook at low temperature for 8 hours.
